h1: The Chain of Custody for Monetary Truth
intro: Money does not become accounting truth automatically. It becomes truth through custody. Inside enterprise finance, monetary movement passes through controlled states — from quotation and transaction through settlement, account assignment, ledger maintenance, reporting, consolidation, and audit-defensible reality.
doctrine_statement:
AccountCcy.com is the chain of custody for monetary truth inside enterprise finance.
The asset maps where monetary movement becomes recorded, assigned, reconciled, translated, consolidated, reported, and defensible.
primary_section_title: Currency gains institutional meaning only through governed transitions.
primary_section_body: Enterprise finance does not treat currency as a single static flag on a transaction. The same monetary event can carry multiple identities — quotation, obligation, settlement, account custody, ledger maintenance, reporting presentation, group consolidation, and audit scrutiny.

Without naming those transitions, finance organizations inherit fragmentation: reconciliation burden, FX distortion, close-cycle friction, and audit exposure long before misconduct enters the picture.
Custody is the institutional discipline through which movement becomes record — not magically at posting time, but through deliberate assignment, reconciliation, and defensibility across systems.
graph_title: The supreme thesis anchors the reference architecture.
graph_intro: Every pillar — framework definition, CCY State Chain, account currency discipline — unfolds downstream from this thesis. The doctrine page exists so readers grasp custody before navigating mechanics.
grid_title: The supreme thesis anchors the reference architecture.
grid_intro: Every pillar — framework definition, CCY State Chain, account currency discipline — unfolds downstream from this thesis. The doctrine page exists so readers grasp custody before navigating mechanics.

cards.label: Thesis
cards.title: Monetary truth is earned through custody, not asserted by rates.
cards.body: Market prices quote possibilities; custody converts obligations into reconciled balances defensible under review.

cards.label: Chain
cards.title: The passage has discernible institutional states.
cards.body: Each state carries a different meaning — identity risk emerges when states blur.

cards.label: Control
cards.title: Account currency is the pivotal custody gate.
cards.body: External monetary movement enters internal accounting discipline primarily through assigned account currency.

cards.label: Defense
cards.title: Terminal custody is audit-defensible reality.
cards.body: Truth survives traceability, support documentation, reconciliation, and independent scrutiny.

control_body: Policies and ERP configurations matter — after governance articulates where custody transfers occur and who owns each boundary.
risk_title: Organizations confuse liquidity FX exposure with accounting custody decay.
risk_body: Treasury hedges rates while fragmented currency identities distort ledger balances reporting consolidation audit narratives downstream.
